# UnnamedProject

## 🚀 Quick Start

### 1. Install Dependencies

```bash
npm install
```

### 2. Configure Environment

Copy `.env.example` to `.env` and fill in your API keys:

```bash
cp .env.example .env
```

### 3. Run the Project

```bash
npm run dev
```

---

## 📦 Project Structure

UnnamedProject/

│       ├── tools/             # Tool definitions
│       └── workflows/         # Workflow definitions
│           └── wpStategraph.ts
├── package.json
├── tsconfig.json
